overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player character walks along city streets passing under massive digital billboards and through palm-tree lined avenues with vibrant neon signage and moderate pedestrian activity.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk toward a large digital billboard archway

notable_agents.action: walking past the camera in the opposite direction
futuristic car driving along the street to the left

entered.detail: modern building with illuminated AVANTE signage on the facade
massive overhead structure with multiple glowing advertisement screens
tall pole with green illuminated signage near the curb
multi-lane street with sparse vehicle traffic

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk at night, with the AVANTE building prominent on the right and a massive digital billboard archway visible in the distance. The player walks forward along the concrete sidewalk as vehicles pass on the street to the left, and a pedestrian walks by in the opposite direction.

lighting shifts to brighter glow from overhead advertisement screens illuminating the path

agents.ego_description: walking under the massive digital billboard structure with screens overhead

entered.detail: low concrete blocks lining the edge of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The player passes under the massive digital billboard archway, entering a semi-covered space where glowing advertisement screens dominate the overhead view. Concrete barriers line the right side of the walkway as the player continues forward beneath the illuminated structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm trees and vertical neon light installations

passing vertical red neon light columns that cast colored reflections on the ground

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered archway, the scene opens into a wide plaza lined with palm trees in illuminated planters. The player walks past vertical red neon light columns that cast vibrant reflections on the tiled ground, with futuristic buildings visible on the right and the street continuing to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial avenue with high-rise buildings

events.description: pedestrian density increases while approaching the commercial district ahead
multiple vehicles pass by on the left side of the street

agents.ego_description: continuing down the neon-lit avenue with increasing pedestrian and vehicle activity

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in business attire walking toward the camera
futuristic sedan driving past on the street

entered.detail: tall commercial buildings with extensive neon signage and illuminated windows
bright red and blue vertical signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues along the neon-lit boulevard with increasing urban density. The player passes more pedestrians walking in various directions while vehicles drive past on the left. Tall buildings with extensive neon signage line the street, creating a vibrant cyberpunk atmosphere as the walk continues toward the distant illuminated signs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a futuristic city at night, moving from a standard urban sidewalk into a glowing architectural archway and finally into a vibrant, neon-lit plaza. It begins on a concrete sidewalk beside the AVANTE building, moving forward past passing vehicles and pedestrians toward a massive digital billboard archway in the distance. As the camera passes under this structure, the environment shifts into a semi-covered space dominated by overhead advertisement screens and concrete barriers. The scene then opens into a wide plaza where the lighting transforms into vibrant red hues from neon columns and illuminated palm tree planters. Finally, the walk continues along a dense boulevard, passing more pedestrians and towering buildings with extensive signage that deepen the cyberpunk atmosphere.
